data.name: Moanarchy
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Moanarchy, a whimsical blend of kingdom management and parody harem chaos. As the newly crowned King, you’ll juggle the impossible task of ruling an eccentric medieval realm while tending to the unpredictable dramas of a growing harem. Every decision you make carries consequences, both for your kingdom’s prosperity and for your reputation as a monarch.

STORY

The tale unfolds in a land where citizens take their most bizarre problems very seriously. Petitions brought before the throne can swing from the ridiculous to the vital, forcing you to weigh prudence against greed, kindness, or comedy. At your side stands your loyal but sharp-tongued Advisor, forever struggling to balance your political duties with the fallout from your questionable courtly decisions.

Meanwhile, your harem expands, drawing in colorful women from across the kingdom. Each has her own quirks, benefits, and disasters to unleash—whether through magical mishaps, political scandal, or simple rivalry. As tensions grow, so does the comedy, until you’re left questioning whether you’re truly running a kingdom… or starring in the most absurd romance farce ever told.

GAMEPLAY

Every day brings new choices. Hear petitions from your citizens and decide whether to approve or reject, directly impacting three core stats: Gold, Population, and Happiness. Manage these carefully to keep your realm afloat, while navigating the unpredictable ripple effects of past decisions.

At the same time, recruit and interact with new harem members whose unique traits can boost, sabotage, or outright transform your kingdom. Balance politics with seduction, responsibility with indulgence, and find out if you have what it takes to survive both the throne room and the bedroom.

data.short_description: Rule a whimsical kingdom, hear absurd petitions, and grow a chaotic royal harem. Balance Gold, Population, and Happiness while juggling politics, comedy, and courtly drama in this parody mix of strategy and romance.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
